test: apps/benchmark/tests/controller.test.ts > M2 paired representation protocol > exhausts an M2 provider pool through per-call conservative settlements
releaseWorkflowImpact: verify:release invokes pnpm test with default parallelism, so the unchanged release gate can fail nondeterministically.
recommendation: Review a separate correction to the test's timing model or workload. Do not conceal the defect by globally serializing tests, increasing the timeout, or weakening coverage.
